caption: The video captures a group of soccer players engaged in a stretching routine on a well-maintained grass field, likely during a pre-game warm-up or training session. The players, dressed in matching blue jerseys and green shorts, are performing a synchronized stretch where they kneel with one leg extended forward and the other bent behind them. They appear focused and coordinated, indicating a structured team exercise. In the background, the stadium seats are mostly empty, suggesting this could be a practice session rather than a match day. The Coca-Cola and LaLiga logos visible on the advertising boards add to the professional setting of the scene.
